description: Commercial accounts in Judaeo-Arabic and Arabic script and Greek/Coptic numerals. Mentions people such as Abū Isḥāq Ibrāhīm; Hilāl; Abū l-Ḥasan; Abū Yaḥyā, Shemuel. Mentions various textile goods, also wax/candles; the most common item looks like نون or نور. Expenses for customs (maks) and inspectors (mufattishīn) are mentioned several times.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בArabic, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
